• Offer valid only on payments made through MobiKwik UPI (@ikwik).
  • Minimum Order value: 999
  • Cashback will be credited to the MobiKwik Wallet within 24 Hours.
  • Valid for all users and can be availed once per user during the offer period.
  • Offer valid till 31st March 2026
  • Download the MobiKwik app, create an @ikwik handle, and complete your UPI KYC to be eligible.

attributeArea.name: content
attributeArea.value:
Biozyme Performance Whey- Recognized by the World!
MuscleBlaze Biozyme Performance Whey is crafted exclusively for fitness and muscle-building champions who want their protein supplement to be as effective as their efforts. It is scientifically designed with Enhanced Absorption Formula (EAF®) to maximize the bioavailability of protein for the Indian bodies. It’s a part of MB’s pioneering innovation- the BIOZYME series. The other fitness supplements in this iconic series are Biozyme Whey Iso-Zero & Biozyme Whey Protein.

 

Features of MB Biozyme Whey Protein!
Informed Choice  Program Certified, U.K.
MB Biozyme series are part of the prestigious Informed Choice, U.K. program- which tests blind samples from any market across geographies every month.
Product Of The Year Sports Nutrition
MB Biozyme Whey went on to compete with all global brands in the sports nutrition category at the NutraIngredients 2021 Singapore awards & won “Product of the Year” accolade- the only protein from India to ever do so.
International Award-Winning ‘Scoop On Top’ Packaging
With MuscleBlaze’s innovative packaging, you don’t need to rummage inside the whey protein supplement container to find the scoop. You get the scoop on top, right after removing the cap. Hygienic and consumer-friendly!
Labdoor, USA Tested & Certified- For Accuracy & Purity
Labdoor in California, USA is one of the world’s most reputed independent testing labs. MB Biozyme Whey are all tested and certified by Labdoor, USA for accuracy & purity of label claims (including protein content). These Certificate of Analysis & Purity are publicly available on Labdoor’s official website for viewing.
 
U.S Patent Published (No. US 17/425582)
MB Biozyme series is not only filed for a Patent in India, but also for grant of Patent in the United States in 2020.
Enhanced Absorption Formula (EAF®)
MB Biozyme range is renowned for there proprietary, international patent-applied Enhanced Absorption Formula (EAF®). It minimizes any protein digestion issues.
25 g Protein per Serving
Human body cannot naturally produce the EAAs, which is why we need to consume them through whey protein. This nutrition supplement delivers 25 g protein, 11.75 g EAAs, 5.51 g BCAAs per serving to enable fast post-workout recovery, boost muscle synthesis, and reduce muscle soreness.
Protein Authenticity Assured
MB Biozyme series comes with a unique authenticity code like all MB health supplements to help customers verify if the product is genuine or fake. Each product comes with a NABL-accredited 3rd party lab-test report wherein you can check the protein content of your product based on its batch number on MuscleBlaze’s official website.
 
50% Higher Protein Absorption & 60% Higher BCAA Absorption- Clinically Tested
Protein’s bioavailability for the body ensures higher muscle gains or better post-workout recovery. MB’s International & Indian patents-published Enhanced Absorption Formula (EAF®) - also known as MB EnzymePro® - ensures 50% higher protein absorption and 60% higher BCAA absorption. This is a result of the higher bioavailability of protein enabled only by the Biozyme formulation!
This clinical study methodology, detailed results data, etc. are available online with the Indian Council of Medical Research (ICMR’s) Clinical Trials Registry- India (CTRI).
